x-enumeration-literals.name: Loan Provision Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Loan / Credit Provision: Delivers funds to customers through loans, overdrafts, or credit lines.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Interest & Fee Application Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Calculates and posts interest and applicable fees according to the product terms.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Repayment Management Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Tracks and processes scheduled repayments, including principal and interest.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Credit Risk Monitoring Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Monitors credit exposure, customer repayment behavior, and potential defaults.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Compliance & Reposting Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Ensures adherence to regulatory and internal lending policies.
